boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No match on batch ID. CLOSE-XOR-078 covers batch X-79; BATCH-XOR-078 releases batch X-78.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-XOR-078 mismatches batch X-78; STD-XOR-078-P mandates exact batch match.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Batch ID mismatch blocks release. Closure covers X-79 not X-78; exact match per STD-XOR-078-P not satisfied.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Exact match required for batch, assay, criterion, and release date before release. Batch mismatch persists.

final_answer: The clinical batch release cannot proceed. Deviation closure CLOSE-XOR-078 references batch X-79, which does not match the target batch X-78 specified in BATCH-XOR-078. Policy STD-XOR-078-P requires an exact match for batch, assay, criterion, and release date before release. This condition is not met and deviation alert DEV-XOR-078 remains visible. The source boundary is not closed. Escalate for defect resolution to obtain a closure matching batch X-78.
open_blockers: Batch ID mismatch: closure covers X-79, target batch is X-78.
Exact match requirement unsatisfied per STD-XOR-078-P.
